description: 重構 modular viewer，使其以 curriculum-source build artifacts 為正式輸入，移除 preview-era renderer 假設並收斂 i18n 與 adapter contract。

tasks.desc: Define source-build viewer adapter contract: required unit metadata fallback, node metadata fallback, content_form mapping, and learner-facing field resolution order.
Split current renderers.js into modular renderer registry files by content_form and interaction mode, while preserving current mockup shell behavior.
Audit direct learner-facing *_zh_tw reads in modular viewer renderer paths and enumerate which fallbacks must move into adapter helpers.
Make viewer i18n-first by moving approved fallback resolution into adapter/helpers and removing direct learner-facing *_zh_tw dependencies from renderer bodies.
Verify source-build compatibility for lesson_01~03 and map missing adapter coverage across grammar_summary, practice_card, review_card, dialogue, pattern_lab, and related content forms.
Patch unsupported source-build form handling so renderer dispatch fails soft on missing metadata or malformed payloads instead of relying on preview-only assumptions.
Define preview fixture deprecation path: distinguish source-build fixtures from hand-authored previews and stop treating preview JSON as source of truth.
Add a source-build regression checklist for lesson_01~03 covering zh_tw/en locale switching, metadata fallback, and non-crashing renderer coverage.
